recommendations.title: Rescue Under Fire
recommendations.overview: The crew of a medical helicopter suffers an accident when helping a joint force of USA and United Nations troops under Spanish command division in Afghanistan. The Spanish army has only one night to organize the rescue of the crew and injured, but wh

recommendations.title: Heli
recommendations.overview: Heli must try and protect his young family when his 12-year-old sister inadvertently involves them in the brutal drug world. He must battle against the drug cartel that have been angered as well as the corrupt police force.

recommendations.title: Army of One
recommendations.overview: Out hiking, Special Forces Brenner Baker stumbles onto a Cartel's compound. Her husband's killed and she's left for dead. The Cartel made two mistakes, killed her husband and left her alive. They won't live to make another.

recommendations.title: Drug War
recommendations.overview: A drug cartel boss is arrested in a raid and coerced into betraying his former accomplices as part of an undercover operation.

recommendations.title: Toy Soldiers
recommendations.overview: After federal agents arrest a drug czar and put him on trial, the cartel leader's vicious son storms a prep school and takes its students hostage. They rebel against the armed intruders and try to take back their academy by any means necessary.

recommendations.title: Narco Sub
recommendations.overview: A former U.S. Navy Seal is forced to become the international criminal he once fought against when a powerful and violent drug cartel kidnaps his wife and daughter.

recommendations.title: Running with the Devil
recommendations.overview: A leader of a drug cartel sends his two toughest henchmen to investigate why a shipment was botched.

recommendations.title: Gorgeous
recommendations.overview: When Ah Bu, a girl from a small fishing town in Taiwan, finds a glass bottle with a romantic message, she travels to Hong Kong to find her prince charming. As it turns out, her prince charming, Albert, happens to be gay. But all is not lost when Ah B

recommendations.title: The Sunset Limited
recommendations.overview: A deeply religious black ex-con thwarts the suicide attempt of an asocial white college professor who tries to throw himself in front of an oncoming subway train, 'The Sunset Limited.' As the one attempts to connect on a rational, spiritual and emoti

recommendations.title: Death Wish 4: The Crackdown
recommendations.overview: After the death of his girlfriend's daughter from a drug overdose, Paul Kersey takes on the local drug cartel.
